sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni postali su suštinski dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become an essential part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُهَا النَّاسُ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ وَالْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi ih koriste za komunikaciju i brzu pretragu informacija.
sentences.translationEn: People use them to communicate and search for information quickly.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ فِي تَنْظِيمِ وَقْتِنَا عَبْرَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi uređaji nam pomažu u organizaciji vremena putem modernih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: These devices help us organize our time through modern applications.
